title: How many hospitals are in the U.S.? | Hospital Data
content: # How many hospitals are in the U.S.? ## How many hospitals are in the United States? The Definitive Healthcare HospitalView product tracks 7,378 active U.S. hospitals as of April 2024. Other sources of hospital lists and totals can vary depending on how the organization classifies each hospital type or the number of hospitals they have data for. ## What are the different types of hospitals? * Critical access hospitals are designated by the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid (CMS)") to help reduce financial vulnerability of rural hospitals and improve access to healthcare. ### Most common hospital types in the U.S. More than half of the hospitals in our HospitalView product are short-term acute care hospitals, making them the most common type of hospital in the United States. Critical access hospitals are the second most common hospital type in the U.S. with over 1,300 hospitals nationwid

title: How Many Hospitals Are There in the U.S.? - eHealth
content: Total number of U.S. hospitals: 6,120 Number of U.S. community hospitals: 3,510, with 3,319 urban community hospitals and 1,810 rural community hospitals.
